title: Paleo Perfectly French Purple Sprouting Broccoli Gratin
description: A garlicky, crunchy, kid-friendly French dish featuring purple sprouting broccoli in a paleo-friendly gratin form, infused with the flavors of bhuna spices.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large saucepan, bring 4 cups of water to a boil and blanch the purple sprouting broccoli for 5 minutes.
In a skillet, heat the coconut oil over medium heat and saute the minced garlic until fragrant.
Add the bhuna spice mix to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
In a large bowl, combine the blanched broccoli, garlic and spice mixture, and toss to coat.
In a separate bowl, mix the almond flour, egg, salt, and black pepper to make the topping.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange the broccoli mixture in an even layer and top with the almond flour mixture.
Bake the gratin in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the broccoli is tender.
